setup.overview.today.label: Today
setup.overview.module.locations.title: Locations
setup.overview.module.roles.title: Roles & Shifts
setup.overview.module.roles.desc: Roles, shift templates and late/absence rules.
setup.overview.module.staff.title: Staff
setup.overview.module.staff.desc: Assign roles and locations. Set managers.
setup.overview.module.payRules.title: Pay rules
setup.overview.module.delegated.title: Delegated access
setup.overview.module.delegated.desc: Let managers assign roles at their store.
setup.locations.title: All locations
setup.locations.subtitle: {{count}} locations · Click to configure Wi-Fi, GPS and staff
setup.locations.tab.staffDisabledHint: Save or cancel your edits before viewing staff
setup.locations.validation.title: How the system verifies staff presence
setup.locations.validation.wifiOnly.sub: Device must connect to the store Wi-Fi.
setup.locations.validation.gpsOnly.title: Location only
setup.locations.validation.gpsOnly.sub: Device must be within the GPS zone.
setup.locations.validation.both.title: Both
setup.locations.validation.both.sub: Requires both Wi-Fi and Location simultaneously.
setup.locations.validation.none.title: No authentication
setup.locations.autoClock.title: Enable auto clock-in/out for this location
setup.locations.autoClock.autoIn.label: Auto clock-in
setup.locations.autoClock.autoIn.sub: When staff connects to store Wi-Fi during their shift, the system records clock-in automatically.
setup.locations.autoClock.autoOut.label: Auto clock-out
setup.locations.autoClock.autoOut.sub: When staff leaves Wi-Fi/Location, the system sets clock-out. Overtime → Pending approval.
setup.locations.autoClock.biometric.sub: Post-MVP feature. Not available for this location yet.
setup.wifi.title: Allowed networks
setup.staffCard.title: Assigned staff
setup.staffCard.search.placeholder: Search by name or staff ID…
setup.staffCard.empty: No staff assigned to this location yet.
setup.roles.title: Roles & Shifts
setup.roles.subtitle: Define roles, shift templates and late/absence rules for the whole system.
setup.roles.list.title: Role list
setup.roles.empty: No roles yet. Add the first role.
setup.roles.shifts.col.name: Shift name
setup.roles.grace.graceHint: Arriving within {{n}} minutes → still counted On-time.
setup.roles.grace.absenceHint: More than {{n}} minutes late without clocking in → automatically marked Absent.
setup.staff.title: Staff
setup.staff.subtitle: Assign roles, locations and pay rates to each staff member
setup.staff.empty.title: No staff found
setup.staff.detail.systemRole.label: System access
setup.staff.detail.locations.label: Work locations
setup.staff.detail.floater.label: Flexible staff
setup.staff.detail.floater.sub: Can be scheduled at any location, not limited to the list above.
setup.staff.detail.roles.label: Roles
setup.staff.detail.pay.label: Pay rate
setup.staff.new.title: Add staff
setup.staff.new.sub: Search via Lark to add to the system
setup.staff.new.lark.label: Find staff on Lark
setup.staff.new.lark.placeholder: Type a name to search Lark…
setup.staff.new.loc.empty: No location chosen — click Add to assign
setup.staff.new.role.empty: No role chosen — click Add to assign
setup.staff.new.floater.sub: Can be scheduled at any location, not limited to the work locations list.
setup.staff.sysRoles.label: System access
setup.staff.sysRoles.noAccess: Regular staff — no web app access
setup.delegated.title: Delegated access
setup.delegated.subtitle: Allow store managers to perform certain admin tasks within their location.
setup.delegated.perm.assignRoles.label: Assign roles to staff
setup.delegated.perm.assignRoles.desc: Managers can assign existing roles. Cannot create new roles or change pay rates.
setup.delegated.perm.editAttendance.desc: Managers can edit clock-in/out times. All changes are logged in the Audit log.
setup.delegated.perm.approveOT.label: Approve overtime
setup.delegated.perm.approveOT.desc: Managers can approve overtime for staff at their store.
setup.delegated.disabled.hint: Enable delegated access to assign managers and configure permissions for this location.
setup.delegated.saveBar.unsaved: Delegated access settings have unsaved changes
setup.delegated.finance.title: Finance rights
setup.delegated.finance.subtitle: Grant finance access to staff. Location management rights are assigned under the Delegation tab.
setup.delegated.finance.drawer.financeSu: Access finance module: view payroll, export company-wide cost reports.
setup.delegated.finance.drawer.isManager: Currently a Location Manager — manage under the Delegation tab
setup.delegated.sysRoles.noAccess: Regular staff — no web app access
setup.auditlog.title: Audit log
setup.auditlog.subtitle: Every change is recorded here. Read-only — cannot be edited or deleted.
setup.auditlog.empty.title: No records found
setup.auditlog.empty.sub: Try changing filters or date range
setup.wizard.basic.title: Basic info
setup.wizard.basic.sub: Name, address and colour for the new location.
setup.wizard.basic.nameHint: E.g. Hoa Dao, Dien Bien Phu
setup.wizard.basic.addressPlaceholder: Street number, street name, ward, district…
setup.wizard.basic.colorHint: Used to identify this location in lists and schedules.
setup.wizard.mode.title: Authentication mode
setup.wizard.mode.sub: Choose the condition for the system to recognise staff presence when clocking in.
setup.wizard.mode.wifiOnly.title: Wi-Fi only
setup.wizard.mode.wifiOnly.sub: Device must connect to the correct store Wi-Fi.
setup.wizard.mode.gpsOnly.title: GPS location only
setup.wizard.mode.gpsOnly.sub: Device must be within the defined GPS zone.
setup.wizard.mode.both.title: Wi-Fi + Location
setup.wizard.mode.both.sub: Requires both Wi-Fi and GPS simultaneously — highest security.
setup.wizard.mode.both.con1: Requires both services to be active
setup.wizard.mode.none.title: No authentication
setup.wizard.mode.none.sub: Staff clock in manually, no location or Wi-Fi check.
setup.wizard.wifi.title: Wi-Fi networks
setup.wizard.wifi.sub: Add one or more store Wi-Fi networks. Staff only need to connect to one of these to clock in.
setup.wizard.wifi.emptyHint: No networks yet — enter SSID and BSSID manually
setup.wizard.wifi.errRequired: Please add at least one Wi-Fi network
setup.wizard.wifi.note: Note: If the store has multiple access points (2.4GHz / 5GHz), add each BSSID. Staff only need to connect to one.
setup.wizard.geo.title: GPS zone
setup.wizard.geo.sub: Define the geographic area where staff may clock in. 50–80m radius is typical for a street-front store.
setup.wizard.auto.title: Auto clock-in/out
setup.wizard.auto.sub: The system can automatically record clock-in/out when it detects staff entering or leaving the zone.
setup.wizard.auto.autoIn.label: Auto clock-in
setup.wizard.auto.autoIn.sub: When staff connects to the correct network during their shift, the system records clock-in automatically.
setup.wizard.auto.autoOut.label: Auto clock-out
setup.wizard.auto.autoOut.sub: When staff leaves the network / GPS zone, the system sets clock-out. Overtime → Pending approval.
setup.wizard.auto.biometric.label: Biometric verification
setup.wizard.auto.biometric.sub: Requires fingerprint or Face ID before clocking in. Feature will launch post-MVP.
setup.wizard.review.title: Review & Create
setup.wizard.review.sub: Check all configuration before creating the location. You can still edit after.
setup.wizard.review.row.name: Location name
setup.wizard.review.cta.title: Ready to create this location?
setup.wizard.review.cta.sub: After creation, continue editing in the location management page.
setup.wizard.success.title: Location created!
setup.wizard.success.body: has been added to the system.
setup.wizard.success.next: Next: assign staff and check Wi-Fi connectivity.
setup.wizard.leaveConfirm.title: Leave wizard?
setup.wizard.leaveConfirm.body: Your new location setup has not been saved and will be lost if you leave.
setup.locations.leaveConfirm.title: Unsaved changes
setup.locations.leaveConfirm.body: Your edits have not been saved. If you leave, all changes will be lost.
setup.colorPicker.label: Location colour
setup.geofenceMap.title: Allowed clock-in radius
setup.geofenceMap.coordHint: Paste coordinates from Google Maps to reposition the pin
setup.geofenceMap.tip: 50–80m radius suits a typical street-front store. Increase to 100m+ for malls.
setup.geofence.errFailed: Could not get location — check GPS permissions
setup.payRules.title: Pay rules
setup.payRules.subtitle: Pay period and overtime rules.
setup.payRules.period.splitDay.label: Mid-month cutoff day
setup.payRules.period.splitDay.desc: Period 1: day 1–{{n}} · Period 2: day {{m}}–end of month
setup.payRules.ot.label: Enable overtime tracking
setup.payRules.ot.desc: Record hours worked beyond scheduled shifts and pay at the OT multiplier configured on each role. All OT requires manager approval before it counts toward pay.
setup.payRules.ot.rateHint: OT multipliers (×1.5, ×2.0…) are configured per {{roleLink}} under Roles & Shifts.
setup.payRules.currency.name: Vietnamese Dong (VND)
setup.payRules.currency.note: Currency is fixed to VND as required by the system.
